arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News Today: Palmer repeat takes shape as €200m raid planned
arts.sum: Chelsea are looking to sign another promising youngster from Man City. Chelsea have made a late enquiry over Man City youngster Nico O'Reilly, according to Fabrizio Romano.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea eye late January transfer of Man City young starlet
arts.sum: Chelsea are making a late push to sign Manchester City prospect Nico O’Reilly as they continue their search for a new central midfielder. The 19-year-old has only featured six times for Pep Guardiola’s senior side, but his potential has caught the attention of the Blues, who are keen on adding another top young talent to […] The post Report: Chelsea eye late January transfer of Man City young starlet appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea target €90m wonderkid deal after agent meeting
arts.sum: Kenan Yildiz is once again being linked with a Premier League transfer after his parents were spotted meeting with superagent Jorge Mendes. According to Gazzetta dello Sport, Juventus director Cristiano Giuntoli met with superagent Jorge Mendes at a restaurant on Friday to discuss business, which isn't out of the ordinary during a transfer window.

arts.ttl: Chelsea and Marseille reach agreement over Aaron Anselmino loan move
arts.sum: Chelsea and Marseille have reached an agreement over a loan move for Aaron Anselmino (19), according to Fabrizio Romano. The 19-year-old centre-back spent the first part of the 2024-2025 season…
